value.title: Three Pillars That Change the Equation

items.title: Validate
items.desc: Test your idea before building — market data, gaps, and sharp positioning.

items.title: Launch

diagnostic.title: Where Are You Now?
diagnostic.subtitle: Answer 4 questions and we'll suggest the best starting point.
diagnostic.q1: Do you have a specific course idea?
diagnostic.q2: Do you know your target audience?
diagnostic.q3: Do you have a preliminary curriculum?
diagnostic.q4: Do you have a launch strategy?

cta.title: Start Now Without Friction
cta.desc: Pick a single service or the full journey.

S1.name: Entry Gateway
S1.desc: Smart landing that routes users to the right service or journey.

S2.name: Idea Discovery
S2.desc: Generate 3 validated ideas + a professional positioning statement.

DR.name: Deep Research
DR.desc: Collect precise market insights before building the curriculum.

S3.name: Curriculum Builder
S3.desc: Transformation-first curriculum, no fluff, measurable objectives.

S5.name: Launch Emails
S5.desc: A 5-email sequence for a strong launch.

S7.name: First 100 Students
S7.desc: Organic growth plan to reach your first 100 students.

S8.name: Review & Governance
S8.desc: Review and approval workflow on every deliverable.

S9.name: Templates & Assets

settings.subtitle: Customize the app and manage data
settings.aiLiveDesc: Connected to Claude via the configured proxy.
settings.aiMockDesc: Services use mock output. To enable Claude, set VITE_CLAUDE_PROXY_URL.
settings.dataDesc: All data is stored locally. Export a backup or restore one.
settings.resetDesc: Permanently deletes all courses, outputs, and templates.

blueprint.title: Final Venture Blueprint
blueprint.subtitle: A complete view of your journey · ready to present and share
blueprint.heroDesc: This page consolidates every output from your course into one product story, exportable as a professional bundle.
blueprint.allDoneDesc: Every stage is ready. Export the full bundle or share it with your team or investors.
blueprint.chooseCourse: Pick a course to view its blueprint
blueprint.chooseCourseDesc: The Final Blueprint shows everything you've built in one place — from idea to growth plan.

share.title: Share
share.desc: Copy the link below to share this deliverable — anyone who opens it can view the results.
share.body: This deliverable was generated with Test Your Product with Engineer Abdulaziz.
share.note: The link contains a snapshot of the deliverable. Share it publicly or keep it as a reference.
